programme.title: Grizzly
programme.desc: An eighteen-foot-tall grizzly bear terrorizes a state park, leaving it up to a Park Ranger to save the day.

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's a bloodthirsty plant, forcing him to kill to feed it.

programme.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: A poetry blogger with an abusive husband turns to one of her fans for support, but she begins to discover that she's found an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Romance Novelist Jo must work with Navy Seal officer Colin on her next book. Will Colin put Jo through the wringer, or will cupids bow bring this unlikely pair together in harmony?

programme.title: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Tom and Ellen Bowen are a brother and sister dance act whose show closes in New York. Their agent books them in London for the same period as the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 1
programme.desc: The first in a Double Bill: Safari hunter, Allan Quartermain, heads into Africa in order to rescue a man, who had disappeared while searching for the fabled lost gold mines of King Solomon.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a Double Bill: Legends of countless riches lie ahead as Quartermain and his crew of explorers encounter thrilling twists and turns deep down in King Solomon's mines.

programme.title: A Sister's Obsession
programme.desc: A teacher's life is thrown into turmoil when her vengeful twin sister tracks her down, blaming her for their separation at an orphanage. Starring Lindsay Hartley and Jason Cermak.

programme.title: Taking Your Daughter
programme.desc: When her daughter vanishes after a date, a mother's intuition kicks in. As she digs deeper, she uncovers a chilling pattern - others have disappeared under similar circumstances.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: In Australia's Outback during the early twentieth century, the impoverished Carmody family lives a nomadic life out of their wagon, but the mom and son want to settle, while the dad is against it.

programme.title: Incontrol
programme.desc: A group of students discovers a machine that projects consciousness into the minds of others.

programme.title: The Escape Artist
programme.desc: David Tennant is the brilliant lawyer in this shockingly twisty thriller. A barrister who excels in getting clients out of tight legal spots discovers the fallout could be deadly.

programme.title: The Escape Artist
programme.desc: Liam Foyle is back in the dock, and Will's courtroom nemesis, Maggie Gardner, is defending him. Will's central moral tenant that everyone deserves a defence has come back to haunt him.

programme.title: C.A.M. - Contagious Aggressive Mutations
programme.desc: A rare parasite has contaminated a local meat processing plant and novice tactical police team are sent in.

programme.title: For the Love of Chocolate
programme.desc: Aria is busy planning for the annual chocolate festival when she loses her competition partner. But when single father Rhett comes to her rescue, will her new recipe come with a dash of love?

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Kid's cooking show producer Kelly hires top chef Stephan to host her show. The only problem is he's arrogant or is he just misunderstood?

programme.title: Made for You with Love
programme.desc: Amanda is a wedding dressmaker reluctant to change her ways. But will handsome photographer James help her bring her business into the 21st Century and open her eyes to the prospect of love?

programme.title: Jamaica Inn
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Daphne Du Maurier, a young woman discovers her uncle heads a gang of ship-wreckers and murderers under the secret patronage of the local squire.

programme.title: Earthsea
programme.desc: Harmony has been disrupted in the land of Earthsea, and an unlikely young wizard is the only hope to restore balance and stop a nefarious king.

programme.title: Earthsea: Part 2
programme.desc: Ged continues his fight with the shadow, while Tenar is accused of killing the mother. Together with his friend, Ged comes to Antuan. The king is planing to let the evil out.

programme.title: The Wrong Patient
programme.desc: A successful plastic surgeon becomes entangled in the web of a narcissistic patient whose path to perfection threatens to destroy her family.

programme.title: Killer in Red
programme.desc: Personal shopper Christa is an expert at what makes a woman feel great, until she finds a client who wants something from her, her fiance, and she will kill to get it.

programme.title: Krakatoa, East of Java
programme.desc: Kowalski. Captain Hanson of the 'Batavia Queen' is preparing to embark on a salvage expedition the late 19th Century Dutch East Indies. His mistress, Laura.

programme.title: Identikit
programme.desc: A troubled woman sets off on a holiday to find a man to whom she can give herself completely.

programme.title: The Holcroft Covenant
programme.desc: The son of a German General becomes part of a mysterious conspiracy to gain hidden Nazi funds.

programme.title: Swimfan
programme.desc: It's a teen thriller kind of like 'Fatal Attraction' where a high school senior who's rising in the swimming world has a one-night hookup that leads to some bad stuff...

programme.title: The Onion Movie
programme.desc: Satirical interpretations of world events and curious human behavior.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: Amanda Schull and Morgan David Jones star in Steve DiMarco's romcom about an ambitious journalist who discovers the target of her big news story is at the same yoga retreat as her.

programme.title: Forever in my heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: Amanda Schull and Morgan David Jones star in Steve DiMarco's romcom about an ambitious journalist who discovers the target of her big news story is at the same yoga retreat as her.

programme.title: A King In New York
programme.desc: A recently-deposed European monarch from a fictional country seeks shelter in New York where he becomes an accidental TV celebrity. Before long he is accused of being a Communist. (Charlie Chaplin)

programme.title: Blackbeard
programme.desc: The true story of Blackbeard the Pirate, the most infamous and fearsome seafarer of them all.

programme.title: Blackbeard Part Two
programme.desc: In 1717, Royal Navy Lieutenant Robert Maynard is sent to the West Indies on a secret mission to destroy notorious pirate ship The Queen Anne's Revenge and its crew.

programme.title: Murder in the Vineyard
programme.desc: After moving from the city to a quaint suburban town, a womans daughter inexplicably becomes the target of bullies. Can they uncover the towns dark secret?

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: When Dr. Hillary Spenser saves the life of Gregory Lipton, he becomes dangerously obsessed with her, threatening the good doctor and all those in her life.

programme.title: Francesco
programme.desc: The life of St. Francis of Assisi from rich man's son to religious humanitarian.

programme.title: Lawless Range
programme.desc: Brothers, Sean and Tommy Donnelly live and work in modern day Texas. Tommy has always been troubled and Sean has always been there to help him, but when Tommy gets himself $6,000 in debt.

programme.title: Clementine
programme.desc: Reeling from a one-sided breakup, heartbroken Karen breaks into her ex's lake house. There, she strikes up a complicated relationship with provocative younger woman Lana.

programme.title: Tell Me Your Name
programme.desc: Growing up wasn't easy for Ashley, and in her quest for belonging, she accidentally welcomes an evil presence, leaving her family and friends in a desperate battle to save her.

programme.desc: Dr. Melendez, Dr. Browne and Dr. Park gave a young couple two choices: save the woman's life or their future in starting a family. Meanwhile, Dr. Lim has to take care of personal matters and leaves the ER in the care of Shaun and Dr. Reznick.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun revisits his past to help a teenager with a mental disability cope with his separation from his mother. Claire has to deal with a climbing teenager and his worried parents.

programme.title: Eternal love (VO)
programme.desc: Kemal is still not convinced and Emir blames Nihan for this. Meanwhile, Zeynep finds herself in the wrong place at the wrong time.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Halit tries to regain control after what happened, but new tensions and unexpected alliances change the game. While Yildiz doubts her future, a revelation puts everything at risk.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Sanem dreams of living in the Galapagos Islands and being a writer, but her mother wants her to find a job. When she gets it at an advertising agency, the young woman kisses Can at the company's birthday party.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Jerry Maguire is a successful representative who works for a major sports company. After going through a crisis of conscience, he is fired and abandoned by all his friends.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Jerry Maguire is a successful representative who works for a major sports company. After going through a crisis of conscience, he is fired and abandoned by all his friends.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: A brilliant adaptation of Edith Wharton's Pulitzer-winning novel. A fabulous romance about three wealthy New Yorkers caught in a tragic love triangle.

programme.title: A Love like in Books
programme.desc: A bookstore owner imagines a possible fairytale romance with her new suitor, but suddenly her irritating former business consultant makes her see love from a new perspective.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Melendez, Dr. Browne and Dr. Park gave a young couple two choices: save the woman's life or their future in starting a family. Meanwhile, Dr. Lim has to take care of personal matters and leaves the ER in the care of Shaun and Dr. Reznick.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun revisits his past to help a teenager with a mental disability cope with his separation from his mother. Claire has to deal with a climbing teenager and his worried parents.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: The wedding day is approaching. Zeynep is full of doubts and nerves and tries to convince herself that she is ready for a new life without Alihan.

programme.title: Dreaming Bird (VO)
programme.desc: Sanem dreams of living in the Galapagos Islands and being a writer, but her mother wants her to find a job. When she gets it at an advertising agency, the young woman kisses Can at the company's birthday party.

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Lale and Onur are determined to get a divorce, but they are both sad. Lale says he will get a lawyer and ends up contacting a successful lawyer named Hürriyet.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Paraíso starts its big sale and Luciano, with the help of Clélia, decides to make his contribution to saving the store.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Vittorio is deeply distressed by Andreina's escape and tries to locate her, unaware that the private detective Bonanni is also on her trail at the behest of Umberto Guarnieri.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Everyone, in their own way, tries to make Can recover his memory. Sanem feels alone because Denis leaves home and Can still doesn't remember his love.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: The war for power intensifies as old betrayals come to light. As Yildiz loses trust in Ender, new alliances threaten to change everything.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: A young military wife's illicit affair ends in tragedy when suspicions arise about her unexpected disappearance in the mines of Joshua Tree National Park.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Sanem's family invites Can to dinner in an attempt to get him to regain his memory. However, he does not identify with the reality that they tell him about him, before the accident.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: Viola returns from the fashion world of Paris to Palermo, where she tries to find her father. She gets work as a crime journalist and is introduced to inspector Francesco Demir, who puts her under investigation for the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: Farah's abandonment affects Francesco greatly; feeling a complete lack of trust, he also moves away from Viola. He wants to be a free man again, and he tells her frankly, which hurts her.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Songül sees Nergis' advertisement on television and becomes furious. Songül forces his daughters to sign a filial contract. Filiz decides to return home. Seeing that Lale is sad, Songül forgives her.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge: The Mystery of Hannah Swensen
programme.desc: As Hannah and Mike navigate their engagement and balance their demanding careers, a murder at a 24-hour gym complicates their wedding plans.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun and Morgan try to treat a man with the help of his brother. Claire asks Dr. Melendez for help to treat a friend of hers who is dying from cancer. Dr. Glassman continues to fight for his recovery.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: A lung tumor, a ruptured fallopian tube, and childhood vaccinations... Shaun proves that Dr. Glassman is truly losing his memory. Claire goes back to Dr. Melendez. Lea goes out with friends for a few drinks...

programme.title: eternal love
programme.desc: Hakki wants Kemal to return to the company, but Asu makes another proposal. As Nihan tries to catch Zeynep, Emir will have to make a decision.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: The fight for control intensifies and forces everyone to take sides. As Yildiz and Ender openly confront each other, impulsive decisions and new decisions change the course of the family.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Mevkibe and the rest of the women in the neighborhood help Leyla to publicize her work. Mevkibe and Nihat worry when they see that Sanem spends a lot of time with Can.

programme.title: Prometo Amar-te
programme.desc: A car accident leaves Paige in a coma. When she wakes up and reveals that she is suffering from total memory loss, Leo, her husband, has no alternative but to commit himself to winning her over. For the second time...

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Murderer
programme.desc: When Chris Watts, seemingly calm but with a subtle smile, pleaded with television cameras for the safe return of his pregnant wife, Shanann, and their two missing young daughters, dark secrets lurked just beneath the surface.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is a top secret government agent with a license to kill who decides to quit his job when he finds and marries the woman of his dreams. But happiness is short-lived, since they have put a price on his head. He doesn't know who is after him, but he knows that there are several murderers and that it could be anyone. His neighbors, his friends, former colleagues, his current co-workers... Spencer will team up with his wife to find out who the mysterious characters are who want him dead before the bullies finish them off... and their marriage!

programme.title: The agent
programme.desc: In the year 2030, the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and faces serious environmental problems as a result of global warming. All those citizens who are unproductive are exiled to a colony.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Upon returning from a mission in Mombasa, elite soldier Ray Garrison and his wife are kidnapped and murdered. Shortly afterward, Ray awakens in the Project Spirit Reborn facility with no memory of his past.

programme.title: The flight
programme.desc: Commander Whip Whitaker is forced to make an emergency landing of the aircraft he is piloting, thereby saving many lives. He is considered a hero, until the subsequent investigation reveals that he had used narcotics the night before the incident. The pilot faces a trial in which he must put his career and his own life in order.

programme.title: Darrow y Darrow
programme.desc: Darrow & Darrow follows the life of Claire (Kimberly Williams-Paisley), a lawyer with her own firm, a single mother to a high school girl, and an amateur detective who solves mysterious murders.

programme.title: Beauty and the beast
programme.desc: Adaptation of the story of Beauty and the Beast. When Bella's father is shipwrecked, she is exiled to the countryside. The land belongs to the kingdom of the Beast, from whom he steals a rose and is sentenced to death. Belle sacrifices herself for her father and goes to live in Beast's castle. There he will investigate the secrets that surround its owner and discover that he was a prince. True love will arise between them without expecting it.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: the ghostbusters
programme.desc: Dr. Peter Venkman (Bill Murray) takes advantage of his research scholarship at the University to torture boys and conquer girls who take psychosensory tests. He is actually a very capable scientist who resorts to logic rather than superstition, but he uses the girls' gullibility to flirt with them. His friends, Dr. Raymond Stantz (Dan Aykroyd) and Dr. Egon Spengler (Harold Ramis), carry out ectoplasmic studies to investigate the possible existence of ghosts and even capture one for later study. The first time they have a warning about the real presence of a ghost in a library, they don't know how to deal with it and run away. It is after they are kicked out of the University that they decide to mortgage Stantz's house and start their own ghost hunting company. Over time they manage to develop machines that trap ectoplasmic beings for later study. But the jobs that come to the office are nonsense with what is about to fall on them. A young woman who lives alone begins to have truly shocking paranormal experiences in her home and decides to call the Ghostbusters to help her. The investigation will take them further than they ever thought they would go, seeing things they would never have dreamed of seeing. In Aykroyd's original script, the story took place in a future where there would be teams of ghostbusters like there are today of paramedics or firefighters. But the budget studied for that type of film amounted to three hundred million dollars and Aykroyd was forced to adapt it to the scientific reality of the 1980s. Initially other actors were going to play some of the most important roles in the film: John Candy was going to be Louis Tully, John Belushi was going to be Dr. Peter Venkman, and the role of Winston was written specifically for Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Dr. Franks is a prestigious neurosurgeon who is going to carry out a unique and very dangerous operation: implant the memories, secrets and abilities of CIA agent Bill Pope who has just died in the mind of another person. This is a cutting-edge method that is presented as the only way the agency has to recover confidential information of vital importance from Pope's memory that compromises the national security of the United States. The problem is that the only candidate to become the vessel of the deceased's mind is Jericho Stewart, a dangerous and unpredictable convict who is on death row awaiting execution and who has a brain abnormality that makes him perfect for the mission. However, no one can assure that the result is the most effective way to stop a terrible conspiracy that is hanging over the country.

programme.title: Crank: High voltage
programme.desc: Hitman Chelios faces off against a Chinese gangster who has stolen his virtually indestructible heart and replaced it with a sophisticated battery-powered device that requires frequent bursts of electricity to continue functioning.

programme.title: Shark
programme.desc: Summer vacation has arrived in the small resort town of Amity Island. While the city council is in charge of making the place a wonderful and entertaining place for tourists, a great threat is approaching, endangering the safety of bathers. The police chief, Martin Brody (Roy Scheider), receives a tip about the disappearance of a young woman on one of the beaches. When they search the terrain, the young woman's dismembered body is found buried in the sand. The coroner's first resolution is that the girl was the victim of a shark attack. The police chief prepares to close access to the beaches but is intercepted by the Mayor. Brody argues with him until the coroner intervenes again and assures that his first conclusion was incorrect, and that the girl died in a terrible accident when she got caught in the propeller of some boat or ship. The police officer resigns and accepts the Mayor's "recommendation." A horde of tourists arrives on Amity Island that same day. While on Chief Brody's watch, a boy is killed by the shark and the truth becomes impossible to hide. A shark hunting specialist named Quin (Robert Shaw) offers his services in exchange for being the only one to receive the entire reward. Anyway, seeing the ferocity of the attacks, Brody asks for help from a marine biologist, Matt Hooper (Richard Dreyfuss), who identifies the shark attack as that of a white shark, one of the most dangerous. Quin, Brody and Hooper will try to hunt the feared animal together before someone else is hurt. The film's soundtrack is composed by John Williams, a highly successful composer who also created the soundtracks for the most renowned films by Steve Spielberg and George Lucas. Among them are those of "Schindler's List" and "Star Wars", in addition to the main theme of the "Harry Potter" saga. The film is based on a novel by writer Peter Benchley.

programme.title: Corruption in Miami
programme.desc: Ricardo Tubbs (Jamie Foxx, Best Actor Oscar for "Ray") and Sonny Crockett (Colin Farrell) are two undercover police officers from Miami (Florida). Ricardo is intelligent, calm and enterprising, while Sonny has his own way of doing things, although always staying close to the law to avoid problems. Their latest mission is to find out the whereabouts of Arcángel de Jesús Montoya (Spanish Luis Tosar, Goya for Best Actor for "Celda 211"), the leader of a gang of drug traffickers, whose men seem to be responsible for a series of recent murders. Writer and director Michael Mann updates the famous series that he created in the 1980s with this elegant thriller, which stands out for its visual splendor, the raw atmosphere it recreates and the excellent action scenes. Chinese actress Gong Li also appears in the cast.

programme.title: Absolute power
programme.desc: Luther, a specialist in grand thefts, plans to rob the mansion of a tycoon who is on vacation in the Caribbean. However, the victim's wife appears unexpectedly.

programme.title: Shark week
programme.desc: Shark experts return to Plettenberg, South Africa, with new technology: a seal-shaped decoy to study and capture the dramatic battles between sharks and seals.

programme.title: The debt collector 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Mystery at the Florist: A suspicious burial
programme.desc: When a body appears at her cousin's wedding, a former lawyer florist sets out to investigate a crime that hides family secrets and unexpected dangers.

programme.title: Darrow and Darrow: The Body of the Crime
programme.desc: Claire and Miles believe a convicted murderer is innocent and, a year after her imprisonment, begin investigating the case again.

programme.title: The agent
programme.desc: In the year 2030, the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and faces serious environmental problems as a result of global warming. All those citizens who are unproductive are exiled to a colony.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Upon returning from a mission in Mombasa, elite soldier Ray Garrison and his wife are kidnapped and murdered. Shortly afterward, Ray awakens in the Project Spirit Reborn facility with no memory of his past.

programme.title: The flight
programme.desc: Commander Whip Whitaker is forced to make an emergency landing of the aircraft he is piloting, thereby saving many lives. He is considered a hero, until the subsequent investigation reveals that he had used narcotics the night before the incident. The pilot faces a trial in which he must put his career and his own life in order.

programme.title: The Scholar
programme.desc: Young Jules runs a very successful online fashion business. As part of a new job program, you will have to agree to hire the elderly Ben as a senior intern. You will soon realize that your experience and attitude can be very important to the company.

programme.title: Siege status
programme.desc: Third collaboration between director Edward Zwick and Denzel Washington after "Glory Times (1989)" where he won his first Oscar for Best Supporting Actor and "In Honor of the Truth" (1996) and magnificent hand in hand full of tension between Denzel Washington and Bruce Willis. New York City becomes the target of a wave of terrorist attacks. FBI agent Anthony Hubbard (Denzel Washington) is appointed head of the joint anti-terrorist force and together with CIA agent Elise Kraft (Annette Bening), with important contacts in the Arab-American community, they will be in charge of arresting those responsible. Meanwhile, the government declares martial law and sends General William Deveraux (Bruce Willis) to command the troops in charge of occupying the city.

programme.title: the wanted
programme.desc: Doctor Richard Kimble (Harrison Ford) is an important surgeon happily married to a beautiful woman, Helen (Sela Ward). His perfect life takes a complete turn when his wife is murdered and Richard is found guilty and sentenced to death. The bus that takes Kimble and other prisoners to prison has an accident that allows them to escape. After his escape, he will be pursued by law enforcement officers, among whom is Samuel Gerard (Tommy Lee Jones), a persistent commissioner who will not stop until he finds him. Richard Kimble will now have to strive to prove his innocence by finding the culprit of the murder while escaping the chase of the agents. Nominated for seven Oscars and three Golden Globes, the film earned Tommy Lee Jones these two awards in the category of Best Supporting Actor. It also has four BAFTA nominations, of which it won the award for best sound. The feature film is directed by Andrew Davis, an American director and producer known for his action thrillers, including titles such as "High Alert" (1992), "Collateral Damage" (2002) and "Code of Silence" (1985). "The Fugitive" is based on the television series of the same name broadcast between 1963 and 1967, which was a great success with audiences around the world and launched its protagonist David Janessen to stardom. In the film, Doctor Richard Kimble is now played by actor Harrison Ford; previously, the possibility of Alec Baldwin playing the protagonist had been considered.

programme.title: The client
programme.desc: Mark Sway is an eleven-year-old boy who witnesses the death of a mafia lawyer. Before dying, he confesses some very important information to him. But, fearing retaliation, Mark doesn't dare tell the FBI. The FBI pressures Mark to reveal the lawyer's last words, but he, aware that the mafia is watching him, decides to hire a lawyer to protect him. Adaptation of the best seller of the same name by John Grisham, directed by Joel Schumacher (''A Day of Fury'', ''Batman Forever''). Its plot starting point is vaguely reminiscent of that of ''Sole Witness'', although the Mormon community that surrounded Harrison Ford in Peter Weir's film is replaced here by a single character: that of a devoted lawyer. For this reason, the true core of the film, despite being a thriller, is not the judicial plot, but the relationship established between the boy, played by Brad Renfro (chosen from 5,000 candidates), and his lawyer, a role entrusted to Susan Sarandon, for which she was nominated for an Oscar for best actress. Tommy Lee Jones gave life to the third party, in the shoes of an ambitious prosecutor.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: During the escape after committing a robbery, the van in which four thieves intend to escape is shot at by the police and bursts into flames.

programme.title: Son of a Gun
programme.desc: Young JR is accused and imprisoned for a minor crime. When he enters prison he discovers the harshness of life in prison, but he will soon become the protégé of Brendan Lynch, one of the most dangerous prisoners in Australia. However, that protection will have a price and Lynch, along with his team, will have plans for JR when he is released from prison: help them with their escape plan.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Filmed entirely in the Philippines, "Platoon" tells us about the year a young university student named Chris spends in a regiment, who decides to volunteer for the Vietnam War. First part of a trilogy directed and written by Oliver Stone about the Vietnam War (followed by Born on the Fourth of July and Between Heaven and Earth). The protagonist of this story is a young Charlie Sheen, accompanied by a cast among which we highlight Willem Dafoe, Tom Berenger or some at that time still unknown Forest Whitaker or Johnny Depp. "Platoon" was the first film about Vietnam written and directed by a veteran of that war. Oliver Stone created this masterpiece taken from the experiences that he himself lived on the battlefield in his year as a soldier, filming almost a documentary where he tells us in first person through a character named Chris all his experiences in Vietnam. We are thus witnessing one of the most precise and realistic war films that recount this conflict with excellent direction, a script and impeccable editing. As for the exteriors, they are very well detailed and this perfection makes the viewer quickly immerse themselves in the war atmosphere that surrounds everything without rest. Definitely, a spectacular film that shows what until then Hollywood always tried to hide and the best way to get closer to what those days in Vietnam really were. Classic of the eighties and universal cinema.

programme.title: the whole truth
programme.desc: Tom is accused of having murdered innocent civilians in El Salvador, fifteen years ago, in a secret military operation. His wife, Claire, is ready to discover the whole truth...

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker is a shy young student. He has never had much confidence in himself and although he is very intelligent, except for his best friend, the rich Harry Osborn, he has no friends. He has been in love with his beautiful redhead neighbor for years: Mary Jane, but he would never find the courage to propose to her. Meanwhile, he lives in a small neighborhood in the New York borough of Queens with his Uncle Ben and Aunt May. His life will change forever when, during a visit to a laboratory, a radioactive spider bites him, causing changes in him that at first seem frightening but will soon make him feel as if he had spider superpowers: he has colossal strength, he can climb walls and ceilings and he can also create spider webs with his hands. With his new powers, Peter becomes more daring. He no longer needs glasses and has acquired muscles that make him very attractive. At school he saves Mary Jane from falling in the cafeteria and accidentally throws food at a bully named "Flash." When he is about to hit him, Peter manages to neutralize him and impresses his friends and the girl of his dreams. To try to win him over, she lies to her Uncle Ben by saying she is going to the library but actually entering a wrestling contest for $3,000. With the money he intends to buy a second-hand sports car for Mary Jane. But when he wins the fight he discovers that the manager does not intend to pay him. Snubbed, he goes out to the street to find his uncle dying on the ground: a thief has shot him to take the car. In his arms, the one who was like a father to him dies. Peter will now become "Spiderman" and use a costume to take revenge on criminals who destroy families like his. Soon his first enemy will appear: The Green Goblin. The Green Goblin was chosen as the villain of this film since director Sam Raimi felt that the father-son duel would make the film more interesting.

programme.title: Shark, revenge
programme.desc: Years pass and Ellen Brody continues to live in Amyty. Her sons, Sean and Micahel, no longer work at Sea World and her husband passed away some time ago due to cardiac arrest. Currently, Sean is the city's police officer. On Christmas night, he receives the order to go to the beach to unscrew a log from a buoy. In the process he is eaten by a great white shark. Convinced that the sharks have some kind of vendetta against her family, Ellen travels with Michael, his wife and daughter to a house they have in the Bahamas. What Ellen and her family don't know is that the threat has followed them there. The film's main tagline, 'This time it's personal', was parodied in 'Back to the Future II'. In the film you can see a poster for the fictional 'Jaws 19', directed by Max Spielberg and whose slogan is 'This time it's very personal.' This phrase has ended up becoming a cliché in movies with many sequels. Actor Michael Caine could not attend the Oscars and collect his award for 'Hannah and Her Sisters', because he was filming this film at that time. The water in the tank in which the film's climax was shot was filled with blue dye, so Micahel Caine and Lorraine Gary ended up with their hair completely dyed this color. Lorraine Gary was nominated for Best Actress at the United States Academy Awards for Science Fiction, Fantasy and Horror.

programme.title: Mystery in the Florist: Nipped in the bud
programme.desc: Accused of a murder she did not commit, a former lawyer turned florist must solve the crime to clear her name and discover the truth.

programme.title: Moneyball, breaking the rules
programme.desc: The Oakland Athletics just lost again to the New York Yankees in the 2001 post-season. With their main stars, Johnny Damon, Jason Giambi and Jason Isringhausen leaving for another team, it will be the responsibility of their manager, Billy Beane, to find a solution. On a visit to Cleveland, Beane will meet Peter Brand, a young economics specialist from Yale who has a series of radical ideas about how to enhance the value of each player. As proof that he is right, Peter gives him the keys to why Billy failed when he played in the professional league. Convinced that what he says is true, the manager decides to hire him to completely turn his team around. But this new statistical method provokes terrible controversy. The players don't believe in him and neither do the team's shareholders. Instead of relying on each person's experience, character, or intuition, Billy ranks them based on their base percentage (OBP). Thus, he hires players with a very high OBP but with a series of characteristics that terribly undervalue them: one cannot run, another is too old... But the confrontation and controversy are too broad and now Beane will have to face a losing and demoralized team, an overexcited Peter, the team managers who do not believe in him and an entire country that believes that you cannot play that way. During pre-production on Moneyball, cinematographer Adam Kimmel was arrested for crimes related to sexual harassment and possession of illegal weapons and explosives. He was replaced by Wally Pfister. This is the first movie about baseball to be nominated for an Oscar since "Field of Dreams," twenty-two years earlier. In the film, Billy Beane refers to John Poloni as "Rocco." This is a reference to Jack McGee's father, who played in minor league baseball and whose nickname was "Rocco."

programme.title: The debt collector 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

programme.title: They call him Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: The Kaiser's Last Kiss
programme.desc: A German officer is sent to Holland to determine whether the British Secret Service has infiltrated the home of Kaiser Wilhelm II, during the start of World War II, but begins a dangerous and lethal romance with a young Dutch Jew with consequences neither of them could have foreseen.

programme.title: Night of Vengeance
programme.desc: Vincent is a divorced man with a teenage son, Thomas, with whom he barely has a relationship. He works as a police officer in Los Angeles, dealing with corrupt matters hidden from Internal Affairs. After a heist in which he steals a shipment of cocaine from a dealer in Las Vegas, Vincent and his partner Sean Cass volunteer to investigate the case in order to hide their guilt and involvement from Internal Affairs. One afternoon when Vincent is walking with his son, the group of criminals from whom he stole cocaine corners him and kidnaps Thomas, threatening to end his life if he does not return the drugs. The leaders of Internal Affairs suspect Vincent and decide to investigate him. He only has one night to get his son back safe and sound, return the drug shipment, hide the truth from his ex-partner and cleanse his image in front of the heads of Internal Affairs.

programme.title: The beginner
programme.desc: After the murder of his partner, Agent Pulovski (Clint Eastwood), a veteran police officer with a bad temper, will begin working with rookie Ackerman (Charlie Sheen), a young man with emotional problems who is beginning to learn about the profession. Pulovski will try to apprehend the murderers of his former partner, a powerful organization dedicated to the theft and resale of luxury cars. Despite the initial conflicts, both must be understood to locate the brain of the organization.

programme.title: Talking Business
programme.desc: Will the Iran war cut Europe’s dependence on energy imports? Soaring energy prices are hurting businesses and household budgets across Europe, so will this crisis change the continent's energy mix for good? Despite efforts to switch to renewables, Europe is still hugely reliant on imported oil and gas. The CEO of Europe’s biggest gas distributor, Italgas, Paolo Gallo explains how new technology can help and Ben Thompson also hears from EU energy commissioner Dan Jørgensen about concerns that moving to solar, wind and nuclear power could just shift Europe’s dependency to other parts of the world.

programme.title: The Smuggling Business: Undercover
programme.desc: Over the past two years, tens of thousands of migrants have crossed the English Channel in small boats from northern France, despite repeated promises by successive governments to stop the trade. This undercover BBC investigation reveals how people smuggling gangs are operating in plain sight inside a migrant camp in Dunkirk. It exposes a highly organised criminal marketplace driven by fierce competition between rival groups, who enforce control over the settlements through fear, violence and intimidation. The film examines efforts by UK authorities to disrupt and dismantle the criminal networks profiting from the crossings, and questions whether those measures are keeping pace with the scale and sophistication of the operation. BBC investigative reporter Josie Hannett also travels to Crowborough, where opposition to a new asylum seeker accommodation site has turned the town into a flashpoint in the national immigration debate. She asks whether current government policy is likely to deter future arrivals, or whether the UK is preparing for a future that will require many more such sites across the south east

Married Failed
programme.desc: Jack, pencuri yang sedang menjadi buron. Suatu ketika ia merampok sebuah rumah dan mengambil satu peti mewah. Ia mengira itu adalah peti yang memuat perhiasan serta uang banyak, namun ternyata isinya benar-benar di luar dugaan.

programme.title: Dear Mantan
programme.desc: Vino akan melanjutkan kuliah ke luar negeri selama 4 tahun sehingga Bella menerima cinta Dirly, cowok keren dan kaya. Tiba-tiba Vino menghubungi Bella dan akan kembali ke Jakarta. Persoalan semakin keruh Dirly adalah saudara Vimo

programme.title: Kepentok Cinta Sementara
programme.desc: Arga diultimatum pihak kampus untuk melunasi biaya kuliah, Arga sama sekali tidak mempunyai uang. Beruntung ada Bonar yang bersedia meminjamkan uang, namun ada syaratnya yaitu, menjadi pacar sementara adiknya.

programme.title: Cincin Wali
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dari kota melihat gadis yang pernah ditemuinya dalam mimpi. Dia memutuskan untuk tinggal di pesantren yang sama dengan gadis tersebut. Namun, untuk mendapatkan gadis itu dia harus memperoleh cincin wali.

programme.title: Putri Keong Mas
programme.desc: Puteri diserahkan kepada seorang dukun oleh ibu tirinya yang sangat kejam. Sejak saat itu, puteri hidup sebagai keong emas, dan hanya bisa kembali sebagai manusia jika ada seorang pemuda yang jatuh cinta kepadanya.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 2
programme.desc: Saat di rumah Ken, Mpok Yagi meminta izin pada Mama Ken untuk pulang kampung. Mada dan Ken berencana untuk ikut bersama Mpok Yagi. Di kampung Mpok Yagi inilah, diselenggarakan kompetisi silat.

programme.title: Perjalanan Terlarang
programme.desc: Mala dan temannya merencanakan untuk berkemah di hutan belantara, tetapi Mala dilarang orang tuanya dan mereka tetap nekat. Sejak itu mereka terjebak di hutan yang jauh dari keramaian.

programme.title: Married Failed
programme.desc: Jack, pencuri yang sedang menjadi buron. Suatu ketika ia merampok sebuah rumah dan mengambil satu peti mewah. Ia mengira itu adalah peti yang memuat perhiasan serta uang banyak, namun ternyata isinya benar-benar di luar dugaan.

programme.title: Ketemu Cinta Di Online Shop
programme.desc: Rayya adalah mahasiswa yang menekuni bisnis online. Dia mendapat saingan yaitu Pras, teman kampusnya yang juga punya bisnis toko online. Setelah kalah bersaing, Pras bekerja untuk Rayya, dan mereka saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Bukan Ibu Malin Kundang
programme.desc: Adjani adalah seorang gadis miskin yang cerdas dan ambisius. Impian Adjani adalah menyelesaikan kuliahnya secepat mungkin. Dia pun diterima bekerja di sebuah perusahaan besar, namun ada harga yang harus dibayar atas kesuksesannya

programme.title: Factory Cinta
programme.desc: Karin melaksanakan tugas KKN di sebuah desa terpencil selama dua minggu. Merasa bosan, dia dan sahabatnya, Dinda, pergi ke kota untuk berbelanja tapi justru kemalingan dan tersesat. Lalu, Aman datang menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: Sunan Gresik - Pemanggil Hujan
programme.desc: Sunan Gresik memasuki wilayah Majapahit untuk membantu desa yang kekeringan sekaligus menyebarkan agama Islam. Saat Sunan Gresik meminta ijin sang kepala desa, dia ditolak. Namun Sunan Gresik tetap bertahan di desa tersebut.

programme.title: Kembalikan Tubuhku
programme.desc: Dinda dan Marsya mengalami sebuah kecelakaan. Kejadian ini membuat Marsya dan Dinda bertukar tubuh. Dinda masuk ke tubuh Marsya dan menggunakan tubuhnya. Namun justru permasalahan baru dimulai. Bagaimanakah kisah mereka?

programme.title: Tempe Mendoan Bumbu Cinta
programme.desc: Marvin adalah cowok tampan kaya raya yang sayang neneknya, dan sang nenek ingin sekali makan tempe mendoan. Marvin pun tak tahu pencariannya akan hidangan itu akan membawanya ke kisah asmara.

programme.title: Pacar Dari Langit
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya sakit. Mega terpaksa pulang ke kampung halaman dan jatuh cinta kepada alien bernama Zen. yang berjanji akan selalu menjaganya.

programme.title: Dari Mata-Mata Turun Ke Hati
programme.desc: Tanpa disangka Raisa bertemu kembali dengan Radit, cowok gebetan Raisa semasa SMU dulu. Raisa meminta bantuan Firsa, sahabatnya untuk memata-matai Radit. Setelah bertemu dengan Radit, Firsa malah jatuh hati kepada Radit.

programme.title: Manusia Ikan Jatuh Cinta
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya bangkrut, Risa terpaksa pindah ke sebuah kampung dekat laut. Di sana, saat dia nyaris tenggelam, tiba-tiba ada yang membawanya ke permukaan. Saat tersadar, dia hanya melihat sekilas manusia dengan sirip ikan.

programme.title: Manusia Ikan Jatuh Cinta
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya bangkrut, Risa terpaksa pindah ke sebuah kampung dekat laut. Di sana, saat dia nyaris tenggelam, tiba-tiba ada yang membawanya ke permukaan. Saat tersadar, dia hanya melihat sekilas manusia dengan sirip ikan.

programme.title: Brave Archer And His Mate
programme.desc: Guo Jing dan Huang Rong mengasuh putra saudara angkatnya Yang Kang dan memberinya nama Yang Gou. Demi mencegah Yan Gou membalas dendam atas kematian ayahnya, Huang Rong melarangnya mempelajari seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Blue And The Black, Pt 2
All Men Are Brothers
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah patriotik tentang tujuh prajurit dalam kelompok penjahat 108 di Gunung Liang, serta tujuh pertempuran nan luar biasa melawan pejabat pemerintah yang kejam demi menyelamatkan negara mereka.

programme.title: Voyage Of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Kaisar Chien Lung melanjutkan penyamarannya ke Tiongkok Selatan. Ditemani oleh menteri dan sarjana kekaisaran, mereka memiliki banyak kejadian menarik di Yangzhou.

programme.title: The Delinquent
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan kisah tentang para remaja miskin di Hong Kong pada tahun 1960-an. Wang berperan sebagai tokoh utama, seorang remaja pemarah dan pemberontak yang terpikat pada sisi gelap kehidupan.

programme.title: Twin Blades Of Doom
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pendekar terpaksa kembali beraksi setelah keluarganya dibunuh oleh Geng Hantu yang kejam. Tanpa teman, ia harus menghadapi kelima pembunuh seorang diri.

programme.title: The Adulteress
programme.desc: Pada masa kemunduran Dinasti Ching, putra dari hakim lokal membunuh seorang pedagang keliling dan memperkosa istrinya. Sang istri dijebak atas pembunuhan suaminya oleh sang pemerkosa.

programme.title: The Black Lizard
programme.desc: Pendekar pedang Lung Fei menemukan tanda-tanda aneh yang meramalkan kematian tunangannya. Dengan bantuan Kepala Polisi Tieh Hu, ia melakukan penyelidikan dan mengungkap sebuah kisah yang mencengangkan.

programme.title: Hex
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang sakit parah bekerjasama dengan asisten rumah tangganya untuk membunuh sang suami yang kasar. Namun, hal ini menyebabkan serangkaian kejadian mengerikan.

programme.title: The Bully
programme.desc: Mengikuti jejak film komedi kung fu 'ala Jackie Chan' yang populer, film aksi petualangan yang menghibur ini bercerita tentang seorang pelayan teraniaya yang belajar bela diri untuk menghajar seorang pelanggan kejam.

programme.title: Black Magic 2
programme.desc: Dokter Sing merasa bingung dengan gejala-gejala aneh yang dialami pasiennya dan meminta bantuan pada temannya. Penyakit tersebut rupanya disebabkan oleh ilmu hitam yang dilakukan oleh seorang pria jahat bernama Kong.

programme.title: West Chamber
programme.desc: Kisah yang diangkat berdasarkan sebuah opera Tiongkok nan terkenal ini menceritakan seorang sarjana muda nan miskin bernama Zhang yang terpesona oleh Hong, putri dari keluarga berpengaruh yang ia temui di sebuah kuil.

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Kisah legendaris yang bercerita tentang keberanian dan kepahlawanan ini dibintangi oleh Ivy Ling Po yang berperan sebagai Mulan, gadis yang bergabung dengan tentara dan menjadi pahlawan sejati bagi warga Tiongkok.

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: Sekelompok orang nan kikuk berkumpul untuk melindungi seorang jenderal patriotik dari orang yang berencana merebut kekuasaan. Mereka menjadi pengawalnya dalam perjalanan berbahaya ke konsulat Inggris.

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: Sekelompok orang nan kikuk berkumpul untuk melindungi seorang jenderal patriotik dari orang yang berencana merebut kekuasaan. Mereka menjadi pengawalnya dalam perjalanan berbahaya ke konsulat Inggris.

programme.title: Hong Kong 73
programme.desc: Di tahun 1973, bursa saham meroket, namun masalah-masalah sosial di Hong Kong terus memburuk. Bintang-bintang besar TVB dan Shaw Brothers bersatu dalam kisah yang lucu ini.

programme.title: Buddha's Palm
programme.desc: Tersebar kabar jika Ku yang buta menyimpan rahasia Telapak Tangan Buddha. Ia pun diserbu dari berbagai pihak seperti burung-burung raksasa nan mengerikan dan kelompok-kelompok pendekar bela diri.

programme.title: The Love Eterne
programme.desc: Dalam drama peraih berbagai penghargaan arahan Li Han Hsiang ini, Betty Loh Ti berperan sebagai gadis cantik yang menyamar sebagai anak lelaki demi mendapatkan pendidikan yang terlarang bagi anak perempuan.

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: Para pembunuh bertopeng membuat kekacauan dan menebar teror dengan bersenjatakan trisula tajam yang mampu mengoyak tubuh manusia. Hanya tiga pendekar pemberani yang bersedia mencari tahu identitas mereka.

programme.title: The Thundering Sword
programme.desc: Yu, murid sang Guru Besar, dan Chiao Chiao, putri dari musuh bebuyutannya, berada dalam masalah saat mereka jatuh cinta. Hal ini diperparah ketika Chiao Chiao membunuh seorang pria di klan Yu.

programme.title: Call Of The Sea
programme.desc: Seorang nelayan muda bernama Chin Hu jatuh cinta dengan teman masa kecilnya, Hsiao Yu. Namun, putra satu-satunya preman di sana terpukau pada kecantikan Hsiao Yu dan mencoba segala cara untuk mendekatinya.

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1933, 20.000 tentara dan 50 tank Jepang menyerbu Tembok Besar Tiongkok.

programme.title: The Pure And The Evil
programme.desc: Reuni dua teman SMA yang semula manis segera berubah menjadi mimpi buruk erotis yang mengerikan ketika Rose tertarik pada mantan teman sekelasnya, Fang, dan tunangan barunya!

programme.title: Killer Darts
programme.desc: Sekawanan bandit brutal memperkosa dan menjarah di desa-desa Tiongkok. Liu Wen, ahli panah yang tengah berduka, beraksi bersama murid, anak, dan pelayannya guna membalas kematian istrinya dan mengembalikan kedamaian.

programme.title: Return Of The Dead
programme.desc: Enchanted Shadow terdiri dari tiga kisah. Suami dan istri yang harus berhati-hati dengan apa yang mereka inginkan, hantu perempuan tanpa busana yang ingin balas dendam dan wanita tuna susila yang menjadi hantu.

programme.title: The Magnificent Swordsman
programme.desc: The Magnificent Swordsman memusatkan pada sumpah seorang pahlawan untuk membalaskan dendam pada bandit-bandit jahat yang membunuh keluarganya saat ia masih kecil.

programme.title: The Kid With The Golden Arm
programme.desc: Pemerintah mempekerjakan Yang untuk mengawal muatan emas ke daerah yang dilanda kelaparan. Geng Chi Sha, dengan salah satu petarung terbaik mereka, Golden Arm, berniat melakukan pembajakan dan membunuh karyawan Yang.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: Saat mobil yang ditumpangi sejumlah gadis berpapasan dengan mobil yang ditumpangi beberapa pria, Ching Li dan Paul Chin Pei jatuh cinta. Namun, kisah cinta mereka tidak berjalan mulus.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: Saat mobil yang ditumpangi sejumlah gadis berpapasan dengan mobil yang ditumpangi beberapa pria, Ching Li dan Paul Chin Pei jatuh cinta. Namun, kisah cinta mereka tidak berjalan mulus.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Aksi kepahlawanan dan kisah asmara mewarnai film seni bela diri klasik ini. Saat Shaolin dikhianati oleh Pertapa Alis Putih, Fong Sai Yuk sang prajurit pemarah bersumpah untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: Ling Yun berperan sebagai pemain pengganti yang disewa oleh sebuah band populer setelah pemain drum mereka yang egois mengundurkan diri untuk bergabung dengan band saingan mereka.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxer
programme.desc: Petinju Tai Chi nan hebat, Ku Ting, menyembunyikan keahliannya dengan bekerja sebagai pekerja konstruksi. Namun, saat para preman menyerang kekasihnya, ia akhirnya menggunakan kung fu guna mengalahkan musuh-musuhnya.

programme.title: The Cave Of Silken Web
programme.desc: Bagian ke-3 dari film Journey To The West produksi Shaw Brothers ini mengikuti perjuangan para jagoan kita saat dijebak oleh 7 siluman laba-laba penggoda, yang bertekad untuk meraih keabadian dengan memakan para biksu!

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: The Water Margin karya sutradara Chang Cheh merupakan film seni bela diri paling epik, diangkat dari legenda nyata tentang 108 pemberontak yang hidup di gunung dan mampu berkali-kali mengalahkan serbuan tentara Sung.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: Saat Chang Sun memberikan tumpangan pada Wen Jou yang tengah tersesat, ia langsung jatuh cinta. Namun, Chang harus memperjuangkan cintanya karena kakak Wen, seorang gangster bernama Wen Chiang, tidak menyukainya.

programme.title: The Bride From Hell
programme.desc: Idola tahun '70-an, Hsing Hui dan Yon Fan, membintangi film horor yang bercerita tentang pengusaha muda yang menikahi wanita muda nan cantik tanpa menyadari jika sang gadis dirasuki oleh iblis.

programme.title: Portrait In Crystal
programme.desc: Di film fantasi seni bela diri ini, jenderal Teng Wei Hao curiga bahwa sebuah lukisan kristal telah dikutuk dan menyebabkan beberapa pembunuhan. Ia mengutus anak buahnya untuk menyelidiki pencipta lukisan itu.

programme.title: Forbidden Tales Of Two Cities
programme.desc: Urusan asmara dan moral di era modern hanyalah segelintir masalah dari cerita yang berlatarkan Makau ini. Kisah cinta antara empat anak manusia menjadi cerita utama dalam kisah humor ini.

programme.title: My Rebellious Son
programme.desc: Seorang pejabat korup berusaha mencuri patung Buddha nan sangat berharga dari kuil untuk menyenangkan sekelompok orang dari Barat. Dokter Zhang dan putranya berhasil mengalahkan musuh dan menyelamatkan patung itu.

programme.title: Tragic Commitment
programme.desc: Selama lima tahun, Alex menjalani pernikahan bahagia dengan istrinya Tung, seorang ginekolog. Saat Alex terluka parah dalam sebuah kecelakaan, ia merasa harus memberitahu Tung tentang perselingkuhannya dengan Blackie.

programme.title: Five Elements Ninjas
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda ahli bela diri merencanakan aksi balas dendam terhadap seorang ninja yang telah membunuh guru dan saudara seperguruannya.

programme.title: The Jade Faced Assassin
programme.desc: Melodrama laga yang bercerita tentang pejuang wanita yang membesarkan putra musuhnya. Sementara itu, saudara kembar sang putra dibesarkan oleh musuh sang pejuang agar pada akhirnya kakak beradik itu akan saling membunuh.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: Sebuah upaya pembunuhan yang gagal di Harbin, Cina pada tahun 1909 mengubah arah sejarah. Kini dua agen JBI harus menemukan hubungan antara benda tersebut dengan sebuah artefak Korea kuno.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Paman Hua adalah pensiunan agen yang memiliki toko barang antik di sebuah jalan tua. Namun, jalan itu dihancurkan secara paksa oleh Geng Naga Hijau setempat, dan membuat identitas Paman Hua tak sengaja terungkap.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: Raja Naga dikunci dalam segel oleh Tuan Naga selama 500 tahun, dan putri sang Raja harus kembali ke masa lalu guna membunuh Tuan Naga saat mengetahui bahwa keduanya adalah teman dekat di masa lalu.

programme.title: Face To Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu tewas dalam sebuah kecelakaan ski. Kemudian, teman sekamarnya, Yoshio, menikahi istrinya serta mewarisi seluruh kekayaannya. Namun, segalanya berubah sejak Yoshio bertemu seorang pria tua di pemakaman Tamotsu.

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: Demi menolong putranya yang diculik oleh jaringan perdagangan manusia, petugas polisi Zhang bekerja sama dengan seorang wanita misterius guna memecahkan sindikat kejahatan internasional dan menyelamatkan putranya.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Liang Pao-erh bergabung dengan Spinsters' Club yang riang ketika dia menemukan suaminya berselingkuh. Terlepas dari wajah bahagia yang ditampilkan oleh saudara perempuannya, di balik itu semua, masing-masing dari mereka diam-diam merindukan seorang pria dalam hidupnya.

programme.title: The Monkey Is Back
programme.desc: Monyet Batu, memberikan harapan kepada seorang gadis kecil nan putus asa. Namun, Monyet Batu dikalahkan dalam pertempuran melawan Dewa Perang bermata tiga, yang membuatnya kehilangan kekuatan dan jatuh ke dunia fana.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemuda mengabaikan peringatan seorang ahli feng shui dan memutuskan untuk menikah sebelum berusia 30 tahun, serangkaian kesialan mulai mengutuk hidupnya.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Fai, yang pernah menjadi juara dunia tinju, melarikan diri ke Makau dari rentenir dan secara tak terduga bertemu Qi, seorang pemuda yang bertekad memenangkan pertandingan tinju.

programme.title: Song Of The Assassins
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh mengemban misi pertamanya sambil diam-diam menyelidiki penyebab pembantaian keluarganya beberapa tahun silam. Namun, ia malah terjerat dalam suatu konspirasi politik saat menjalankan misi.

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: Sebelum memenangkan pujian dalam film laga berkat aksi-aksi mereka yang berani, para bintang ini menjalani tahun-tahun penuh darah, keringat, dan air mata saat berlatih di bawah bimbingan Master Yu yang kejam.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: Serangkaian kejadian aneh terjadi di sebuah desa, di antaranya sesosok mayat yang bangkit dari kuburnya dan melarikan diri. Saat diselidiki penduduk desa, seorang penjahat meninggal dan sang kepala desa menghilang.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Pergantian rezim di Leka memicu konflik di dunia hitam & putih. Polisi mengirim Zheng Zha menyusup ke geng Song Bang, tanpa tahu pihak lain sudah siap membalas dendam.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Pergantian rezim di Leka memicu konflik di dunia hitam & putih. Polisi mengirim Zheng Zha menyusup ke geng Song Bang, tanpa tahu pihak lain sudah siap membalas dendam.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: Sebuah film fantasi-horor berlatar belakang Moskow masa kini, di mana masing-masing kekuatan yang mengendalikan siang dan malam saling bertempur.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: Petualangan bersejarah nan epik berlatar masa-masa penuh gejolak di masa Tiga Kerajaan. Cao Cao berusaha untuk memasukkan Guan Yu ke dalam pasukannya, tapi Guan tetap setia pada Liu Bei, yang merupakan musuh Cao.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Mantan kapten SWAT, Dong Gu, menderita kehilangan penglihatan traumatis kala gagal menjalankan misi. Namun, musuh bebuyutannya muncul dan membuat putrinya dalam bahaya. Ia pun harus berjuang menyelamatkan putrinya.

programme.title: Love Is Love
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri miskin, Shui dan Ti, berusaha membangun kehidupan mereka sendiri. Dan melalui kerja keras mereka berdua, Shui menjadi seorang eksekutif pemasaran, kemudian sikapnya mulai berubah.

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. B, yang memiliki nama lengkap Benjamin Barker, adalah seorang pegawai kantoran yang menjalani kehidupan monoton. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah insiden aneh di laboratorium ilmiah tempat temannya bekerja, Mr. B terpapar dengan zat misterius yang memberinya kemampuan untuk terbang. Awalnya, dia merasa bingung dan takut, tetapi segera dia mulai mengeksplorasi kekuatan barunya dengan penuh semangat.

programme.title: Open The Coffin
programme.desc: Sebuah film misteri supranatural dengan seorang detektif yang menyelidiki pembunuhan yang tampaknya merupakan akibat dari kutukan.

programme.title: Young Heroes Of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: Kisah ini berlatar di Shanghai pada akhir masa Dinasti Qing, dan bercerita tentang seorang pemuda bernama Chen Zhen yang menjadi seorang pahlawan nasional usai menanggung kesulitan dan mengatasi tantangan dalam hidup.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun adalah seorang ahli bela diri terampil yang bertarung untuk membalas dendam atas kematian sang kekasih dengan bantuan dari seorang pemimpin geng pengemis.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Seorang fotografer terjerat oleh sesosok 'wanita berbaju merah' hingga menyebabkan kerabatnya tewas satu per satu. Ia pun bersumpah untuk mencari tahu kebenarannya saat gadis yang ia sukai juga tewas secara misterius.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Seorang fotografer terjerat oleh sesosok 'wanita berbaju merah' hingga menyebabkan kerabatnya tewas satu per satu. Ia pun bersumpah untuk mencari tahu kebenarannya saat gadis yang ia sukai juga tewas secara misterius.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang wanita berusia akhir dua puluhan yang menemukan kembali bakatnya dalam bertinju setelah lama absen. Secara tak terduga, ia bertemu dengan mantan pelatih tinjunya dan keduanya bekerja sama untuk membantunya mencapai babak final pertandingan tinju profesional.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang tahun-tahun awal Republik Tiongkok, keluarga Kang yang kaya dibunuh secara brutal, dan putri kecil mereka satu-satunya saksi menghilang secara misterius.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: Sebuah kartel narkoba menduduki wilayah Dong Zhou. Mei Jing dari Unit Komando Wanita Thunderbolt memimpin timnya untuk menyerang markas mereka. Namun, Mei dan timnya disergap dan identitas ayah Mei terungkap.

programme.title: Girl With The Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: Lily, adalah seorang gadis biasa yang menjalani kehidupan sederhana. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah pasar antik, dia menemukan sepasang sepatu kaca berlian yang indah. Tanpa disangka, sepatu ini ternyata memiliki kekuatan magis yang dapat mewujudkan impian dan memberikan keberuntungan. Ketika Lily mencoba sepatu tersebut, dia segera menemukan bahwa hidupnya mulai berubah drastis. Dia mendapatkan pekerjaan impiannya, bertemu dengan orang-orang penting, dan bahkan menarik perhatian seorang pangeran modern yang tampan.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng adalah seorang petarung jalanan yang memutuskan untuk hidup di Kowloon Walled City. Ia terlibat dalam perkelahian dan konspirasi. Saat temannya diburu oleh geng triad, Neng harus menyelamatkan temannya.

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Chen Li Pin, putra dari pengusaha yang culun, mendapat kekecewaan usai mencari jodoh di Hawaii bersama temannya. Kemudian, secara tak sengaja mereka terjebak dalam sebuah pertukaran identitas yang kacau.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: Marbles, seorang anak berusia 10 tahun, menyaksikan pembunuhan seorang wanita muda.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Bintang laga Chow Yun-Fat memerankan gangster sungguhan Chen Daqi saat ia naik ke eselon atas kekuasaan, mendapati dirinya terpecah antara cinta dua wanita, rencana pembunuhan dinas rahasia, dan ancaman perang yang membayangi.

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: Seorang wanita diperkosa dan dibunuh selama Perang Dunia II. Empat puluh tahun kemudian, ia kembali untuk menghantui para penganiayanya dari Rumah Besar Tao Tao. Seorang profesor dan keluarganya pindah ke rumah itu, hanya untuk kemudian roh-roh tersebut mengambil putra mereka.

programme.title: How To Choose A Royal Bride
programme.desc: Kaisar muda Kangxi sedang berusaha memilih seorang istri. Ibunya telah mengatur agar beberapa wanita muda yang tersedia mengunjunginya sehingga ia dapat memilih.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up

programme.title: Cornwall: A Year by the Sea
programme.desc: On the windswept hills above Port Quin Bay, the Williams family enter the most demanding and rewarding season of their year - lambing time - a round-the-clock labour of care, skill and instinct. On the southern shores of the Helford River, the reigning world champion gig rowing team are back on the water, training hard for the challenges ahead. Gig rowing is a deep-rooted part of Cornish heritage. Meanwhile, the calm waters of the Camel Estuary are home to a thriving oyster business. Matt and his family are hard at work cultivating their prized oysters, carefully nurturing them from seed to plate. And in Rock, a vital project is underway to rebuild the pontoon - an essential lifeline that connects businesses, boat owners and visitors to the water. Exec Prods: Katie Truen Bell/Rachel Innes-Lumsden; Prod/Dir: James Nutt; Series Prod: Ruth Binsley; Twofour Broadcast (S2 Ep2)

programme.title: Life According to Nino
programme.desc: Kehidupan Nino van Doorn (8) baik-baik saja. Ia mempunyai saudara laki-laki yang hebat, Lucas (14), ayah yang bijaksana, Bruno, dan ibu yang seperti malaikat, Marla. Ketika Marla meninggal, Bruno tidak dapat mengatasi kematiannya. Juga nilai-nilai seperti ketertiban, tanggung jawab, cinta, dan kepedulian yang diwakilinya. Kedua saudara itu menciptakan dunia mereka sendiri. Namun segera dunia anarkis itu terancam oleh dunia luar. Kedua saudara itu siap untuk menipu sistem, tetapi yang terjadi adalah mereka benar-benar menjadi keluarga lagi.

programme.title: Formentera
programme.desc: Formentera merupakan sebuah pulau di Spanyol. Pulau ini terletak di bagian Laut Tengah. Tepatnya di Kepulauan Balears, Spanyol.

programme.title: Homestead
programme.desc: Di tengah kekacauan, mantan Baret Hijau bergabung dengan kompleks persiapan; cinta tumbuh, kebenaran muncul, dan sebuah komunitas bersatu.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Max McGrath dan rekan aliennya, Steel, harus menggunakan dan menggabungkan kekuatan baru mereka nan luar biasa untuk berubah menjadi pahlawan super Max Steel.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: An Ordinary Man
programme.desc: Seorang penjahat perang yang bersembunyi membentuk hubungan dengan satu-satunya penghubungnya dengan dunia luar, yaitu pembantunya.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...

programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: Kehidupan sehari-hari supermodel Cindy Crawford meliputi berolahraga, makan siang bersama Helena Christensen, dan menyalakan lampu di Empire State Building.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello

programme.title: Bandit

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy

Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. programme.title: Blueprint To The Heart
programme.desc: Desainer interior yang mencoba menyelamatkan acara renovasi rumahnya perlu menerapkan strategi renovasi rumah "fixer upper" kelas atas yang sukses kepada tukang kayu kerah birunya dengan menjadikan pria manis tapi acak-acakan itu sebagai proyek fixer upper berikutnya.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Blood For Dust
programme.desc: Cliff, seorang penjual keliling yang tenggelam dalam beban menafkahi keluarganya dan mitos impian Amerika, mendapati dirinya berada di jalan yang berbahaya setelah bertemu secara kebetulan dengan Ricky, seorang rekan dari masa lalu yang kelam.
