programme.title: Chicago P.D. S13
programme.desc: Burgess takes a rookie officer under her wing as the team investigates a volatile drug case.

programme.title: Kuntilanak 3 (2022)
programme.desc: Dinda yang dianggap aneh oleh anak-anak desa karena kekuatannya, secara tidak sengaja melukai Panji dan Ambar. Dia menyesalinya dan meminta Bibi Donna untuk mendaftarkannya di Sekolah Mata Hati

programme.title: Kasarung langur
programme.desc: Karena menginginkan istri yang secantik ibunya, maka guru Minda dikutuk oleh ibunya sendiri menjadi Lutung Kasarung. yang akan berubah menjadi manusia lagi, ketika ada wanita yang mencintainya

programme.title: Karmila
programme.desc: Karmila yang mengandung karena diperkosa oleh pacarnya tidak menerima kehadiran sang anak. Sikapnya berubah saat sang anak sakit keras.

programme.title: Kesurupan Jumat Kliwon
programme.desc: Keempat pemuda yang memutuskan untuk bunuh diri karena berbagai masalah. Sebelum bunuh diri, mereka berlibur di rumah tua dekat pantai, yang dimana rumah itu terkenal angker. Terror kepada mereka pun terus berlanjut

programme.title: Drop Si Pitung
programme.desc: Pemuda yang berusaha keras untuk menumpas ketidakadilan di desanya yang diakibatkan oleh Darip dan Ramdani. Ia sampai menuntut ilmu di luar desa untuk dapat mengatasi dua orang tersebut.

programme.title: Cinta Kembar
programme.desc: Rhoma Irama sukses besar sebagai musikus dangdut. Kedua adiknya, Deddy dan Herry penuh semangat berlatih karena ingin mengikuti jejak sang kakak. Sebagai remaja, keduanya tak lepas dengan masalah asmara.

programme.title: Senggol Bacok
programme.desc: Galang tempramental & tidak pernah takut apapun, namun ia harus mengendalikan emosinya untuk dapat memenangkan hati sang cewek idaman.

programme.title: Kuntilanak 2 (2019)
programme.desc: Dinda berniat menemui Karmila yang diyakini sebagai ibu kandungnya. Sialnya, Dinda yang berangkat bersama adik dan temannya malah terjebak dalam rumah di tengah hutan. Kejanggalan mulai terjadi di rumah tersebut.

programme.title: Mertua Vs Menantu
programme.desc: Bianca menikah dengan Risyad, namun kebahagiaan mereka terganggu oleh hubungan yang tidak harmonis antara Bianca dan mertuanya, Ibu Hany, karena perbedaan yang kerap menimbulkan konflik.

programme.title: Queue Dong
programme.desc: Dendy, pemuda mata keranjang yang berhubungan dengan tiga wanita, Linda, Cindy dan Sally. Masalah datang saat mereka bertiga datang di hari ulang tahunnya.

programme.title: Taxibike
programme.desc: Denny harus menjadi tukang ojek karena di PHK. Dan juga tuntutan dari sang istri. Banyak ibu-ibu yang menjadi langganannya dan menimbulkan kecemburuan dari sang istri. Dan ikut menjadi pengojek dan menyaingi para tukang ojek pria

Menceritakan tentang rumah yang baru ditempati oleh Kevin dan Nayla. Mereka bertetangga oleh Julian, Dita dan anaknya Lila. Namun ternyata rumah mereka berpenghuni mahluk halus yang selalu meneror keluarga-nya.

programme.title: Sister's Verses
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Adinda yang tinggal bersama keluarga yang memiliki pandangan hidup sediri dan lari dari ajaran agama sesunguhnya.Suatu ketika Adinda membrontak dengan ingin mengikuti lomba MTQ disekolahannya.

programme.title: Selamanya
programme.desc: Aristha berjumpa dengan kekasih lamanya, Bara, di kantor polisi. Bara, yang merasa bersalah karena menjerumuskan Aristha ke dunia narkoba, berusaha keras menarik Aristha dari dunia itu

programme.title: Dunia Mereka
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan tentang sebuah band yang terdiri dari beberapa orang yang mempertemukan mereka karena selera musik yang sama. Namun dalam perjalanan mereka, berbagai masalah pun berdatangan.

programme.title: Jamila Dan Sang Presiden
programme.desc: Seorang perempuan bernama Jamila tiba-tiba menjadi headline di semua pemberitaan nasional. Ia mengaku membunuh seorang pejabat tinggi dan menolak mengajukan grasi kepada Presiden.

programme.title: Pulau Hantu 2
programme.desc: Dante, kembali harus terperangkap di pulau hantu dan harus menyelamatkan diri dari sesosok arwah penasaran yang mengejarnya. Keadaan tambah kacau ketika pulau tersebut didatangi anak-anak muda yang ingin membuat pesta

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the exciting and fast-paced quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for a one-million-pound prize - however, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder. Unlike classic Millionaire, each question is against the clock and there is no room for indecision - if a player answers correctly, they remain in the Hot Seat and continue up the Money Ladder, but if they get a question wrong, they are eliminated, the Top Prize drops down, and the next player takes their place. Each player is given one Pass - a chance to pass the question on to the next player - but in doing so forfeit their place in the Hot Seat and risk not making it back there later on. Only one player will have a chance to win the top prize remaining on the ladder, and the player taking on that question must answer it correctly to take home the cash.

programme.title: The Vardys
programme.desc: At Jamie's final game for Leicester City, he scores his 200th goal for the club - it's a fairytale ending to one of the greatest underdog stories in sporting history. But he's not done with football yet, and the search for his new club begins. As speculation mounts, the Vardys consider offers from clubs all wanting to sign the 38-year-old striker. But none are in England, which forces the family to consider: would they go with Jamie, or stay at home? On deadline day, there is last-minute chaos as Jamie decides between two top clubs, one in Holland and the other in Italy. At the eleventh hour, he takes the Italian job. The Vardys are going to Italy! Determined to stay together as a family unit, Becky flies to Italy to find a house and schools for the kids - but in rainy Milan, nothing goes to plan.

programme.title: Torvill & Dean: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Jayne Torvill and Christopher Dean reflect candidly on a remarkable 50-year career on ice as this fly-on-the-wall documentary captures every moment throughout their final UK and Australia tour and the prospect of an emotional 'Last Dance' - our cameras follow the Olympic legends behind-the-scenes throughout their final year as performers, from their preparations and final television performance on Dancing on Ice to the early gruelling training sessions and first rehearsals in Scotland, the iconic first show of the live tour in London, and then throughout the next energy-sapping four months as the duo tour with the support of an ensemble cast of world-class skaters, a unique show that tells their life story from their first meeting to their final-ever performance. There is every chance the wheels may come off, and this film captures the raw emotion of life on the road.

programme.title: Tonight
programme.desc: Are you in danger of developing a dependence on easily available over-the-counter medicines like codeine, nasal decongestants or sleeping aids? GPs and pharmacists are raising concerns that drugs including codeine, oxymetazoline and antihistamines present significant dangers of becoming habit-forming, even addictive if not used correctly. Sam Holder examines a hidden dependence that can devastate lives and cause long term health problems. He meets those struggling to come off drugs that can be bought in any high street pharmacy without a prescription, and we hear from specialists who warn of what can happen in extreme cases of overuse.

programme.desc: Despite Jamie's best efforts on the pitch, his new Italian side are struggling to get a win and stay out of the relegation zone. Things go from bad to worse when the Vardys' lakeside villa is dramatically burgled, leaving the whole family on edge and considering whether to return home. Becky and the kids escape to the mountains for a much-needed change of scenery and time to think clearly about their situation. On a whistle-stop trip back to the UK, Becky and Jamie stage an elaborate photoshoot but also find a quiet moment to make the big decision: whatever happens with the football, they will bring the kids home. On Easter Sunday in Italy, Becky and Jamie reveal their decision to the kids during an Easter Egg hunt to an overwhelming reaction. Shortly after, Becky and Jamie fly the kids back to the UK, arriving home for an emotional reunion with family and friends. But when the season is over, will Jamie be joining them for good or stay in Italy - or will a whole new adventure begin?

It showcases some of the most incredible and peculiar record-breaking attempts and includes interviews with some of the biggest characters from the world of record-breaking - from the fastest dog on two wheels to the longest fingernails in the US, this fun-packed series reveals some of the most extraordinary humans and amazing animals to be found on Planet Earth and is also jammed with the key facts and statistics for each record attempt and the people involved. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: 23-year-old Dianne Price is found drowned in her bath, wrapped in net curtains, and made to look like a bride with a ring on her finger, a bouquet of cheap flowers on a toilet seat, and a chilling message written in lipstick on the bathroom mirror - Barnaby and Jones begin their investigation and find no shortage of possible culprits. While Barnaby ponders the similarity of the case to a string of murders from 1912, Jones struggles with his new boss's love of psychology - the case then leads the detectives to a donkey sanctuary and a pub run by an ex-copper and former madam. When local vet Fran Carter is murdered at a heritage steam railway site - and her body decorated with confetti - Barnaby finds parallels with another decades-old case... could history be repeating itself? It is not long before there are more shocking deaths, and Barnaby and Jones must work fast if they are to catch the killer before it is too late.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Drama based on the novel by Ann Cleeves. After news breaks that Jeanine Long has taken her own life, evidence comes to light exonerating her for the murder of 15-year-old Abigail Mantel 11 years earlier. Jeanie had always insisted on her innocence but no-one - including her own family - believed her. Vera sets out to solve the mystery of Abigail's death, and she and her team delve into the secrets and lies of a small community which is still feeling the repercussions of the killing. Vera digs away at the evidence in her efforts to get closer to the truth, but not before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn when another, potentially connected, murder occurs. With a killer on the loose and the pressure building, Vera must use her skill and instinct to expose the lies at the community's heart - and to lay the ghosts of Abigail and Jeanie to rest.

While Barnaby tries to find out who might have borrowed money from the Lamberts, another cult member dies suspiciously - the police uncover existence of a promissory note and discover that the man who witnessed it died the same night as the Lamberts. As they uncover further shadowy liaisons and conflicting sympathies, the police come to realise that the truth could be hidden within the land itself.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a college dean is found dead, an alchemic image denoting the first of four stages of a process called the Magnum Opus is discovered by the body before the team realise that there are three more murders to follow...

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. Gill introduces her new sergeant to Will Pemberton, an ambitious detective superintendent on his way to the top. However, Rachel and Will have been enjoying a passionate yet discreet affair for the past few months; Will wants to go public, but Rachel would prefer to keep it quiet as she is worried about how others might judge her. Inspired by Eleanor's happy home life, Janet determines to persevere with the dating game, but a speed dating evening proves a disaster when she realises that she is unable to step out of character and has been interviewing every man there as if he was a suspect. The latest case involves the murder of a woman in a Manchester hotel; with only a necklace and the name Lola to go on, Syndicate Nine try to piece together her last known movements. When a witness comes forward to report a troubling sexual encounter, it seems that a hook-up site could hold the answers.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. Unable to get over being second choice for the sergeant's job, Rachel punishes Janet for not telling her. Meanwhile, Janet feels inadequate as a mother after Elise moves in with Ade, but she has not given up on the idea of a boyfriend entirely. When an unconscious baby is admitted to hospital, staff are concerned that his injuries do not match his parents' explanation, but with a child-minder and her stoned boyfriend in the mix, it is unclear who had the baby's best interests at heart.

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: Richard John Neil presents MSUK from Donington with racing from the Porsche Sprint Challenge Great Britain and MINI CHALLENGE.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the planet's biggest and best motorsport series. These include the World Rally Championship (WRC), Formula One, World Motocross, NASCAR, British Touring Cars and much more.

programme.title: The Protectors

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. A fitness trainer offers to knock Thomas into shape in time for an ironman contest in return for finding her missing fiance.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Violent Texan Billy Joe Bob comes to Hawaii to hire the investigator to find his sister, but Thomas has his hands full trying to keep Billy Joe Bob from beating up every local who gets in their way and trying to find his sister Carol Ann, who has gotten in over her head with the wrong crowd.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Series star Roger Moore directs this episode of the adventure series. Simon Templar agrees to act as a go-between by taking ransom money to the kidnappers of the wayward daughter of a rich film producer - however, he has a trick up his sleeve, quite literally, in the shape of a camera disguised as a wristwatch so he can retrace his steps even when blindfolded.

Elsewhere, it's a family affair when Blip meets its stablemate Tantrum - both bots are now desperate for a win after a poor start, and the gloves are off even though they have the same designer.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas learns that his former wife Michelle, now married to the head of a Vietnamese delegation, has been targeted for assassination by a secret police chief who suspects that she may be leader of a revolt against his country.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is surprised when a beautiful woman from England spurns his advances - much to the amusement of TC and Rick - and prefers Higgins. Thomas is certain that the woman is feigning interest in Higgins to somehow use him for an ulterior motive and plans to uncover the truth, but Higgins sees his doubts as jealousy and the relationship between the two men is pushed towards breaking point.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The concluding part of a two-part episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry continues his pursuit of the character who ran off with all the money from the charity ball he held, and Margaret takes on a blackmail case.

programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Danielle finds a collector with a 1937 Harley Knucklehead motorbike while the guys quickly pick through a farm.

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. It's a race to the finale as the chefs are faced with a Grand Prix challenge with a twist - during dinner service, the chefs are then put to the test to see if they have the attention to detail it takes to run a kitchen with a few tricks thrown in by Gordon. Tasked with impressing guest diners including the New York Jets' Solomon Thomas, Superstore actor Lauren Ash, talk show host Sean Evan and former Journey lead singer Jeff Scott Soto, we find out which chefs take a victory lap and which ones will fall flat.

programme.title: Abominable And The Invisible City
programme.desc: Serial Animasi yang melanjutkan kisah petualangan Yi Jin dan Peng dari film 'Abominable'. Mereka sekarang harus melindungi makhluk ajaib bernama Everest dan dunia tak kasat mata dari orang orang yang ingin mengeksploitasinya.

programme.title: Kring Kring Ada Cerita
programme.desc: Sebuah Program yang berisikan pesan kebaikan yang disampaikan melalui dongeng, lagu dan drama singkat yang dibawakan oleh anak - anak.

programme.desc: Lagu Anak Indonesia BaLiTa menyajikan animasi lagu anak Indonesia yang lucu, video belajar membaca alfabet, berhitung dan menyanyi ditemani oleh trio Baba Lili Tata.

programme.title: Juki
programme.desc: Berada pada puncak ketenarannya, Juki dicintai banyak orang karena sikapnya yang polos, jenaka, dan berani untuk beda. Hingga sebuah kesalahan membuatnya berbalik menjadi musuh nomor satu masyarakat.

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure
programme.desc: Ricis bersama timnya menemukan ponsel misterius dan tersedot ke layar ponsel. Ternyata mereka diseret ke portal yang mengirim mereka ke Socidia City, kota metaverse tempat semua aktivitas jejaring sosial di dunia nyata.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.title: Bermain & Bergembira
programme.desc: Bermain & Bergembira bersama anak-anak aktif, cerdas dan kreatif.

programme.title: Hi Kiddos

programme.desc: Menghadirkan tayangan favorit Go Jetters & Hey Duggee yang seru dan edukatif dari Cbeebies.Bersama Go Jetters, berpetualang keliling dunia mengenal berbagai tempat ikonik serta pentingnya menjaga lingkungan yang menyenangkan.

programme.title: Main Yuk !
programme.desc: Program yang dirancang untuk membantu anak-anak mempelajari dasar-dasar pengetahuan dan keterampilan melalui visual, gerakan, suara, dan storytelling yang disajikan secara ringan, menyenangkan, edukatif, interaktif & penuh warna.

programme.desc: Petualangan Cipung dan Monstar adalah Program animasi yang menceritakan tentang petualangan Cipung bersama Dimi, Ilmi, Kimi dan si Sammi. Dalam cerita ini mereka semua bersahabat dengan Cipung.

programme.title: Balita
programme.desc: Lagu Anak Indonesia BaLiTa menyajikan animasi lagu anak Indonesia yang lucu, video belajar membaca alfabet, berhitung dan menyanyi ditemani oleh trio Baba Lili Tata.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Toy
programme.desc: Dolanan merupakan program feature dokumenter yang mengangkat kearifan lokal sebuah desa. Seorang anak akan menceritakan keluarga kecilnya serta kehidupan mereka di tempat tinggalnya.

programme.title: Point S2
programme.desc: Kiko mengisahkan seekor anak ikan mas koki yang sangat mandiri, walaupun dia anak tunggal. Kiko yang selalu riang memiliki 4 sahabat yaitu Lola si ikan diskus, Ting Ting si kepiting, Patino si ikan patin dan Poli si ikan cupang.

programme.title: Bermain & Bergembira
programme.desc: Bermain & Bergembira bersama anak-anak aktif, cerdas dan kreatif.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Jendela Seribu Sungai
programme.desc: Jendela Seribu Sungai adalah sebuah film yang mengisahkan tentang tiga orang anak, yakni Bunga, Kejora & Arian yang tinggal di tepi aliran Sungai Martapura, Banjarmasin. Mereka memiliki cita-cita tersandera oleh keinginan orangtua

programme.title: Hi Kiddos

programme.title: Cbeebies
programme.desc: Menghadirkan tayangan favorit Go Jetters & Hey Duggee yang seru dan edukatif dari Cbeebies.Bersama Go Jetters, berpetualang keliling dunia mengenal berbagai tempat ikonik serta pentingnya menjaga lingkungan yang menyenangkan.

programme.desc: From 2023. From 2023. The reunion ends on an emotional note as Gordon shares heartbreaking news. Ashley gives an update on her divorce from Michael.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Matt Damon returns as Jason Bourne in Jason Bourne, with director Paul Greengrass back for another thrilling chapter. Bourne is drawn out of hiding, facing new dangers with Alicia Vikander, Vincent Cassel, and more.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's 8th film takes place in wintry Wyoming, where eight strangers, including two bounty hunters and a wanted fugitive, find themselves battling the elements and each other.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen has returned home safe after winning the 74th Annual Hunger Games. She senses that a rebellion is simmering, but the Capitol is still very much in control as the next Hunger Games is prepared—a competition that could change Panem forever.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: Seorang pilot kamikaze yang dihantui rasa bersalah karena selamat berusaha menebus dosanya ketika monster raksasa yang gagal dibunuhnya berubah bentuk akibat radiasi dari uji coba bom atom dan mengepung Jepang pascaperang.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen has returned home safe after winning the 74th Annual Hunger Games. She senses that a rebellion is simmering, but the Capitol is still very much in control as the next Hunger Games is prepared—a competition that could change Panem forever.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen dan Peeta Mellark menjadi target Capitol setelah kemenangan mereka dalam Hunger Games ke-74 memicu pemberontakan di Distrik Panem.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: Gerard Butler and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau star as rival gods locked in an epic battle to decide the fate of the universe in this thrilling fantasy-adventure.

programme.title: Gods Of Egypt (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Pahlawan Bek bekerja sama dengan dewa Horus dalam aliansi melawan Set, dewa kegelapan yang kejam, yang telah merebut tahta Mesir, menjerumuskan kekaisaran yang dulunya damai dan makmur ke dalam kekacauan dan konflik.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 1
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 1
programme.desc: Tsunami menghancurkan Waikiki dan memicu bencana berantai. Gunung berapi meletus, air mendidih muncul dari bumi, Hoover Dam runtuh, hingga Mount Rushmore meledak oleh lava.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 2
programme.desc: Hotel-hotel di Las Vegas telah ambruk ke dalam tanah, Dr. Hill dan para penyintas yang tersisa berpacu untuk melarikan diri. Sementara itu, gempa bumi dahsyat mengancam akan membelah Amerika Utara menjadi dua dan pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir berada tepat di jalurnya.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, mulai curiga bahwa dirinya adalah mata-mata setelah mengunjungi Rekall - sebuah perusahaan yang menyediakan klien dengan memori palsu yang ditanamkan tentang kehidupan yang ingin mereka jalani - terjadi kesalahan dan dia mendapati dirinya dalam pelarian.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's 8th film takes place in wintry Wyoming, where eight strangers, including two bounty hunters and a wanted fugitive, find themselves battling the elements and each other.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's 8th film takes place in wintry Wyoming, where eight strangers, including two bounty hunters and a wanted fugitive, find themselves battling the elements and each other.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Di tengah musim dingin Wyoming yang mencekam, seorang pemburu hadiah dan tahanannya menemukan tempat berlindung di sebuah pondok yang saat itu dihuni oleh sekelompok karakter jahat.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: Dalam perburuan harta karun emas yang melegenda, sekelompok prajurit, pembunuh, dan seorang prajurit Inggris yang jahat mendatangi sebuah desa di Tiongkok feodal, tempat seorang pandai besi yang rendah hati berupaya membela dirinya dan penduduk desa lainnya.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: Dalam perburuan harta karun emas yang melegenda, sekelompok prajurit, pembunuh, dan seorang prajurit Inggris yang jahat mendatangi sebuah desa di Tiongkok feodal, tempat seorang pandai besi yang rendah hati berupaya membela dirinya dan penduduk desa lainnya.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Matt Damon returns as Jason Bourne in Jason Bourne, with director Paul Greengrass back for another thrilling chapter. Bourne is drawn out of hiding, facing new dangers with Alicia Vikander, Vincent Cassel, and more.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Jason Bourne kembali muncul setelah lama bersembunyi ketika Nicky Parsons membocorkan data rahasia CIA. Diburu tanpa ampun, Bourne harus menghadapi masa lalunya dan menghancurkan operasi gelap penuh pembunuhan dan pengkhianatan

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's 8th film takes place in wintry Wyoming, where eight strangers, including two bounty hunters and a wanted fugitive, find themselves battling the elements and each other.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Di tengah musim dingin Wyoming yang mencekam, seorang pemburu hadiah dan tahanannya menemukan tempat berlindung di sebuah pondok yang saat itu dihuni oleh sekelompok karakter jahat.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 1
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 1
programme.desc: Tsunami menghancurkan Waikiki dan memicu bencana berantai. Gunung berapi meletus, air mendidih muncul dari bumi, Hoover Dam runtuh, hingga Mount Rushmore meledak oleh lava.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 2
programme.desc: Hotel-hotel di Las Vegas telah ambruk ke dalam tanah, Dr. Hill dan para penyintas yang tersisa berpacu untuk melarikan diri. Sementara itu, gempa bumi dahsyat mengancam akan membelah Amerika Utara menjadi dua dan pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir berada tepat di jalurnya.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 2
programme.desc: Katniss dan tim pemberontak dari Distrik 13 bersiap untuk pertempuran terakhir yang akan menentukan nasib Panem.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In Doomsday, a deadly virus resurfaces decades after quarantine. As chaos erupts, a team enters the walled-off zone to find a cure. Action-packed and gritty, it's a battle for survival.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: Sebuah film thriller aksi futuristik di mana sebuah tim bekerja untuk mencegah bencana yang mengancam masa depan umat manusia.

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen berada di Distrik 13 setelah ia menghancurkan dunia game selamanya. Di bawah kepemimpinan Presiden Coin dan nasihat dari teman-teman kepercayaannya, Katniss mengembangkan sayapnya saat ia berjuang menyelamatkan Peeta dan bangsa yang tergerak oleh keberaniannya.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: Back to the Future

programme.title: Back to the Future II
programme.desc: Marty dan Doc melakukan perjalanan ke masa depan demi menyelamatkan anak-anak Marty. Namun, tindakan mereka memicu rentetan perjalanan waktu acak yang mengacaukan sejarah masa lalu.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: Berdasarkan kisah nyata, Balto adalah petualangan animasi memukau tentang salah satu anjing paling berani sepanjang masa yang menantang badai Arktik untuk mengambil obat untuk anak-anak Alaska

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Oscar, seekor ikan rendahan, menjadi pahlawan ketika dia berbohong. Segalanya menjadi kacau dan dia bekerja sama dengan seekor hiu, Lenny, untuk melawan ikan yang paling ditakuti di laut.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Lima murid SMA dari kasta sosial yang berbeda dihukum bersama di ruang detensi pada hari Sabtu. Lewat interaksi intens, mereka menyadari bahwa mereka punya lebih banyak kesamaan dari dugaan.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: Ulang tahun ke-16 Samantha terlupakan oleh keluarganya yang sibuk, sementara ia mendambakan perhatian dari pria populer di sekolah.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Seekor hiu putih raksasa tiba di pantai resor New England, hingga seorang sheriff setempat bekerja sama dengan seorang ahli biologi kelautan dan seorang pelaut tua untuk memburu monster tersebut.

programme.desc: Pilot maskapai direkrut CIA untuk menjalankan misi rahasia di Amerika Tengah, namun ia justru menjadi kurir narkoba bagi kartel Medellin.

programme.title: Decibel
programme.desc: Seorang mantan komandan angkatan laut menerima panggilan telepon dari pria tak dikenal yang menyatakan telah memasang bom di lokasi yang dipenuhi orang. Bom tersebut adalah "bom suara" yang akan meledak saat suara sekitar melebihi 100 desibel. Mantan komandan angkatan laut pun berusaha mati-matian menghentikan serangan teror tersebut.

programme.title: Love My Scent (tvN Movies)

programme.title: Khiladi 786
programme.desc: Seorang ayah pemilik biro pernikahan menganggap putranya gagal dalam hidup. Untuk membuktikan ayahnya salah, sang putra menerima tantangan besar: mencarikan jodoh untuk adik seorang gangster, membawa mereka ke petualangan penuh kekacauan dan kejutan.

programme.title: Batti Gul Meter Chalu
programme.desc: Kehidupan ketiga sahabat, SK, Lalita dan Sundar, mengalami perubahan nan mengejutkan setelah percetakan Sundar menerima tagihan listrik yang sangat meningkat.

programme.title: Batti Gul Meter Chalu
programme.desc: Kehidupan ketiga sahabat, SK, Lalita dan Sundar, mengalami perubahan nan mengejutkan setelah percetakan Sundar menerima tagihan listrik yang sangat meningkat.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: Rare vehicles are like winning the lottery for every car spotter. With 20 units built, the Pagani Huayra BC is one of the most exclusive vehicles in the automotive world. Its counterpart: the Rimac Concept One, which makes history as the fastest e-car in the world with a top speed of 355 km/h. Lamborghini Huracan O.CT and Arden Jaguar F-Type promise brutal tuning power beyond good and evil. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: We are looking for the king of off-road pickups! The off-road specialists from Delta 4x4 convert the VW Amarok into a beast. Off-road, he challenges Toyota off-road expert Alexander Wohlfarth to a duel in his Toyota Hilux. Who performs better off-road and at the same time still has enough suitability for everyday use? (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993 based on an existing original bodyshell - the unique "Project Gold". Also: the Q5 Sportback, Audi's mid-range SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Danger in your neck and still in a good mood? No problem for the full professionals at Action Concept. Spectacular stunts are her job – and her passion! Explosions, flights, jumps, breathtaking images and exciting behind-the-scene stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maybach – the finest car manufacturer from Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. An outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship. A Maybach is considered the measure of all things modern automotive technology. These vehicles were forgotten for over 60 years - until Mercedes-Benz revived the luxury brand in 2002. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good condition, others a little polished, the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Classic motorcycles are back in fashion. Honda is also reflecting on its great tradition and with the CB 1100 EX has revived a big bike that could have ridden on our streets in the flashy seventies. Nostalgic spoke wheels complete the design of the elegant four-cylinder bike with sufficient 94 hp power, more than enough for a relaxed cruise into the sunset. How does the CB 1100 EX compare to rivals like the BMW R nineT? The Japanese classic in the MOTORVISION TV driving test. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Porsche now offers 27 derivatives of its cult model 911. The selection has never been so large. And it has never been possible to examine all models in one place until today! We are literally speed dating with the Porsche 911. Which variant can win the heart of Motorvision presenter Julian on a road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate and why? (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Elegant, powerful, fast: BMW CS and Mercedes SLC were already part of the crème de la crème of automobile construction in their time in series production. Alpina and AMG, two tuners and refiners of the first hour, get even more out of them. Plus: The rally legend Lancia Delta Integrale is idolized for its racing successes and decried for its unreliability. The track test shows: cult or junk? (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are wild, they are bursting with power and they are cult, the American muscle cars. Whether it's a Ford Mustang, a Chevrolet Camaro or a Corvette, muscle cars are coveted around the world for their rebellious designs, their outrageous horsepower and their breathtaking speeds. Dream Cars presents the most spectacular and fastest US sports and muscle cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Prince Leopold of Bavaria owns two cars that couldn't be more opposite: the BMW Isetta and the BMW Z8. The BMW Isetta is one of the strangest and most successful small cars of the 1950s, designed like an egg on wheels, with a 250cc motorcycle engine and 12 hp. The BMW Z8 is still a dream car today, timeless lines, 5-liter displacement and 400 hp. Classic Rides accompanies Leopold von Bayern as he gets both cars fit for the summer. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. Today in Adventure 4WD: Fata Morgana ahead! At the finale of the Nissan Four-by-Four Challenge, only victory counts! (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: There are cars to rave about and float around: the goddess, the duck and the gangster limousine. From the very beginning, Citroen has celebrated the joy of extravagance. The Traction Avant, called the gangster limousine, is a milestone in automotive history. The 2CV, called Duck, is the most unusual and charming car ever built. It quickly becomes a cult vehicle for students, professors and bon vivants. The DS19, the goddess, looks like she comes from another planet. With the hydropneumatic suspension, it puts its passengers in a state of suspension. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electrifying innovations and autonomous wonders: the future of driving is more refreshing than ever! For example with the Ora Funky Cat. A charming electric vehicle from China with a few special features. And the Audi Activesphere Concept shows what the next generation of the automobile looks like. Here the boundary between reality and the virtual world is erased. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In today's episode Perfect Ride: The 911 Porsche. Modern design, advanced technology, everything new and yet: unmistakably the same for 50 years. We are also testing the world's first standard plug-in hybrid with a diesel engine: the Volvo V60! (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: BTRDA Rallycross 2025
programme.desc: The races of the British Trial and Rally Drivers Association, which was founded in 1938, are highly competitive. The rallycross track with changing surfaces challenges the best drivers in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: At the start of the TT 2025, we take a look at the first qualifying sessions and look forward to Lee Johnston as co-commentator (channel info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
Red Bull Romaniacs
programme.desc: The Romaniacs have become a permanent highlight in the hard enduro community's calendar. After some riders were denied the meeting last year, it was now even more beautiful in Sibiu. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: At the Retro Classics in Stuttgart, presenter Martin Utberg is one of the crowd pullers at the trade fair with his daily stage talks in Hall 10. He welcomes two prominent guests per day in front of a large live audience and talks to them about motorsport, personal experiences and the fascination of classic automobiles. In part 2, Martin speaks to several guests. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Prince Leopold of Bavaria owns two cars that couldn't be more opposite: the BMW Isetta and the BMW Z8. The BMW Isetta is one of the strangest and most successful small cars of the 1950s, designed like an egg on wheels, with a 250cc motorcycle engine and 12 hp. The BMW Z8 is still a dream car today, timeless lines, 5-liter displacement and 400 hp. Classic Rides accompanies Leopold von Bayern as he gets both cars fit for the summer. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. Today in Adventure 4WD: Fata Morgana ahead! At the finale of the Nissan Four-by-Four Challenge, only victory counts! (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: There are cars to rave about and float around: the goddess, the duck and the gangster limousine. From the very beginning, Citroen has celebrated the joy of extravagance. programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In today's episode Perfect Ride: The 911 Porsche. Modern design, advanced technology, everything new and yet: unmistakably the same for 50 years. We are also testing the world's first standard plug-in hybrid with a diesel engine: the Volvo V60! (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: Whether it's the tallest building, the tallest hotel or the most expensive police cars in the world: everything in Dubai is more exclusive, more expensive and bigger. MOTORVISION.TV - #SPOTTED follows the Dubai Police on one of their daily missions and presents the supercars of the most exciting fleet in the world. In contrast to this is the Polaris Slingshot - half car, half motorcycle and without any luxury. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: The SUV boom doesn't stop. Manufacturers are pushing one model after another onto the market. But what actually defines which SUV? With the X2, BMW wants to put a hipster on the road for young people. The DS 7 Crossback is intended to convey a French attitude to life. And Jaguar is bringing the E-Pace, a smaller version of the F-Pace. Motorvision TV looks for the differences. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: How do stunts work? What exactly does a stuntman do? Who are the real heroes of action films? The unique series “Stunt Heroes” on MotorvisionTV has been answering these and other questions for two years. The stunt people from Action Concept, one of the largest film and stunt productions in Europe, give a unique insight into their daily work and into what cannot be seen in the film. Weeks of preparation are often necessary for a 5-second film stunt. Backbreaking work! (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Motorcycling – a hobby or sport with an adrenaline rush, but also with risk. The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Assistance systems that are normal in cars usually seem exotic or even unthinkable on two-wheelers. However, this no longer applies to the blind spot warning system, which BMW is now offering for the first time. Ideal for the dense traffic in big cities, the home territory of the new maxi scooter C 650 GT. We test the new 60 hp large scooter including the assistance system in Valencia and find out in heavy rush hour traffic whether Side View Assist is an annoying paternalism - or perhaps a real help that could soon also come to motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: English luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler. In the Mercedes CLE 53, however, the best place is behind the steering wheel. Mercedes wants to arouse emotions again with a 3-liter in-line six-cylinder engine. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: The Reliant Scimitar is virtually unknown in Germany, but in England it was a car with a kind of cult status just a few decades ago. This is probably why the British royal family used this vehicle as a means of transport for many years. Classic introduces the exotic. Plus: a transport wonder on three wheels. The Moto Guzzi Hercules saves many a small farmer. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are spectacular and environmentally friendly, the most extravagant and fastest electric and hybrid cars in the world: whether Tesla, McLaren P1, Ferrari La Ferrari or Renovo Coupe, the battery- and hybrid-powered cars impress not only with their fascinating design, but also with intelligent technology, breathtaking acceleration and unique dynamics. Dream Cars presents the most exciting e-cars in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.sub-title: Classics on the way to auction
programme.desc: In this episode of Top Speed, presenter Martin Utberg visits the vintage car gallery in Toffen, Switzerland. It has been a permanent address for lovers of classic automobiles for over four decades and is known for its regular vintage car auctions. Together with auctioneer Serge Stotzer and his team, Martin takes a look behind the scenes of the preparations for the next auction. Some of the vehicles that will go under the hammer on Saturday, March 21st will be presented in more detail - and Martin will also get behind the wheel himself to experience these classics on the road. An exciting preview (channel information).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It's the little man's Ferrari - the Fiat Dino Spider. For many it is the most beautiful Fiat ever built. There's actually a Ferrari engine working under the hood and it's making a lot of steam. Michael Mandat's Fiat Dino was actually not for sale. But he hardly has any time left to drive the Dino and now wants to get rid of the convertible. At Classic Rides we will show you how the owner prepares his car for sale and whether the prospective buyer will actually take the Fiat Dino with them. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. Today in Adventure Allrad: Uwe Zirbes gets his new baby. Also a crazy test: Lamborghini Reventon or jet: who takes off earlier? And Adventure Allrad pits a Toyota against the Hummer H3. Which of the two off-road monsters performs better in the endurance test? In today's off-road tip you will learn everything about the ramp angle and its pitfalls. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the car of reason, it is not exciting, but it is the mega seller: the VW Golf, the most successful car in Europe, sold 30 million times. The Golf is mass compatible, classless and it dominates the compact car class. Because of its success, it has long been called the golf class. The models from the I series have long been cult, especially the legendary Golf Gti and the Golf convertible. Car History tells the story of the Golf generation and explains the secret of its success. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Price drop and range revolution. Electric cars overcome old prejudices. The Dacia Spring is one of the cheapest electric cars on the market. A real bargain or are there hidden catches? Volvo's answer to Tesla & Co. The new XC 40 comes with an extended range. How effective is it on a mountain road trip? (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Power Fighter, New Highway, or Low Rider Muscle: Aggressively unusual names for unusual vehicles. In a tranquil Bavarian village, the company Boom Trikes Fahrzeugbau GmbH assembles the coolest tricycles in the republic. With the quality seal "Made in Germany", the small company has developed into Europe's leading trike manufacturer in just under 25 years. (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
Red Bull Romaniacs
programme.desc: The Romaniacs have become a permanent highlight in the hard enduro community's calendar. After some riders were denied the meeting last year, it was now even more beautiful in Sibiu. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: Pure passion for racing, extraordinary talent and thrills right up to the last second - that's what this magazine promises, reporting on the most exciting motorsport events. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Robust and popular - these are the keywords for these models. Subaru has renamed the XV. Completely renovated and with the new name Cros-strek, the SUV is now looking for customers. We reveal what's behind it. And Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a visual sensation. We explain why. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars can't be sporty? But at least with the right boost. The Alpine A290 is intended to bring the brand's racing DNA into the electric age. We'll check whether it works and shed light on the French manufacturer's legendary rally history. And the VW ID.4 GTX shows that electric SUVs can be more than just family cars. We reveal 5 exciting facts. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).
